llm_unified_plan.aggregation_instruction: Preserve LOCAL_SNAPSHOT and LIVE_API scope separately. Return pass_1 local snapshot status and pass_2 live API status side-by-side for Birthday Message. If either pass returns no matching record, note unavailability in that scope. Do not invent records.

passes.expected_result: local campaign record with name and status fields

sql.query: SELECT NAME, STATUS, UPDATEDTIME FROM dim_campaign WHERE LOWER(NAME) = LOWER(?) LIMIT 1

passes.subtask: Collect local snapshot evidence for Birthday Message campaign status

passes.expected_result: live journey metadata including status and state
passes.subtask: Collect live platform evidence from Journey Optimizer for Birthday Message journey status
